title: Author UC for demo-bookmark API endpoints to satisfy INV-COVERAGE-001
description: demo-bookmark has 8 backend endpoints (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /demo/bookmark/bookmark + /tag variants) and 1 frontend route that are unmapped per sense-coverage post-T1. Author a single use-case JSON under docs/product/use-cases/ with refs.endpointIds + refs.routeIds claiming all 9 surfaces. Closure: sense-coverage --human shows 9 fewer unmapped surfaces; INV-COVERAGE-001 violation count drops from 51 to 42.

title: Remove unsupported /meta field from docs/architecture/trace.json

title: Rename or relocate INV-RBAC-001-allowlist.json so spec-validate-invariants skips it
description: spec-validate-all scans every INV-*.json under docs/architecture/invariants/ and fails the allowlist file (16 errors: required fields + additionalProperties). The allowlist is data for INV-RBAC-001, not an invariant. Closure: either rename to 'RBAC-001-allowlist.json' (no INV- prefix) and update INV-RBAC-001 references, or move to docs/architecture/invariant-data/.
